query:
SELECT p.id, p.caption, p.status, p.createdAt, p.scheduledAt, m.storageKey, m.url 
FROM posts p 
LEFT JOIN media m ON m.postId = p.id 
WHERE DATE(p.createdAt) = CURDATE() 
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
